en: You knew what you were doing. You knew this would happen.
ko: 네가 뭘 하고 있는지 알았잖아. 이런 일이 일어날 거라는 걸 알았어.

en: Oaks, and now I'm a tramp.
Go on, get some clothes on.
Take a drive? Why would I want to go anywhere with you?
ko: 드라이브? 왜 너랑 어디 가고 싶겠어?

en: Because I might know you a little better than you think.
ko: 내가 너를 생각보다 좀 더 잘 알 수도 있으니까.

en: And I don't want you waking up one morning thinking that if you'd known everything,
ko: 그리고 네가 아침에 일어나서 모든 걸 알았다면,

en: you might have done something different.
ko: 뭔가 다르게 했을 거라고 생각하지 않길 바래.

en: What are we doing here, Mama?
Do you see that man there?
Doesn't look like it now, but...
